markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategies for improving Sugo's organic traffic and lead generation through content marketing initiatives like editorial content and a potential event directory.](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Editorial content is the lowest hanging fruit and should be prioritized to start delivering value quickly](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [A directory strategy could drive qualified traffic but requires more upfront investment and planning](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Both strategies can be pursued in parallel, with editorial kicking off first while evaluating directory feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Clear alignment is needed on goals (traffic vs. leads/pipeline) and resources before committing to a directory](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### Editorial Content Strategy

  - [Recommended as the fastest way to start delivering value and generating leads](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Can validate topics/keywords of interest through blog posts, guides, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Allows learning what resonates before investing more in a potential directory](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [AirOps can support cost-effectively producing high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

### Potential Directory Strategy

  - [Could create listings/directory of event services companies to drive relevant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Needs careful evaluation of search demand, ability to convert traffic to leads, and resources required](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Different from DeepGram's strategy of capturing their customer's audience](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [More of a long-term, resource-intensive play than editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

### Programmatic SEO Workflows

  - [Marcel's team has developed AI-powered workflows to generate content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Covers all steps from research to writing to publishing and optimizing](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Allows rapidly creating large amounts of content aligned to search demand](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Dedicated specialist is assigned to manage the workflows for each client](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

### Resourcing and Next Steps

  - [Sugo has a small team, so resource constraints are a consideration](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Agreed to regroup internally and come back on costs for editorial vs. editorial + directory](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Target to reconnect early next week to discuss proposal options and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sugo team to regroup and evaluate priorities/resources for editorial vs directory](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Marcel/Matt to prepare proposal options with costings for editorial and editorial+directory](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Reconnect early next week to review proposals and decide on approach](https://fathom.video/share/H5SVs_2z9GStJN3WBUvpoE2pFGS6EXUB?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
